prompt_text:
### Demographics: 38-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 2 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 59.5 kg; Height 169.9 cm; BMI 20.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.2%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 7.6%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 8.7%), FPG (12 months ago 190mg/dL; 9 months ago 154mg/dL; 6 months ago 204mg/dL; 3 months ago 221mg/dL; current 207mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 59.7kg; 9 months ago 58.8kg; 6 months ago 61.1kg; 3 months ago 60.2kg; current 59.5kg), Height (12 months ago 169.9cm; 9 months ago 169.9cm; 6 months ago 169.9cm; 3 months ago 169.9cm; current 169.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 20.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 73mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 8U/L; 9 months ago 7U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 7.0U/L; current 11U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 26U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 93mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 95mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 92mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 91mL/min/1.73m²; current 93mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 4.8mg/g; 9 months ago 4.8mg/g; 6 months ago 5.3mg/g; 3 months ago 6.8mg/g; current 6mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 93mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 159mg/dL; 9 months ago 161mg/dL; 6 months ago 174mg/dL; 3 months ago 173mg/dL; current 167mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.2g/dL; 3 months ago 13.9g/dL; current 13.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.79 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
